headline: Energy Stocks Are Up 33% This Year — Analysts Think 5 Will Jump
summary: Feeling bad you missed the 33% rally in S&P 500 energy stocks this year? There still might be a chance for you to gain.

headline: Cramer Flags AI Winners, Warns STMicro Is 'Late Late Late' At 51x Earnings
summary: Cramer bets on natural gas, AI chips in latest Lightning Round; He likes Devon Energy's gas play, says TSM has more room to run.
